messages.content: 语法检查： The highly dispersed of the Ni over the Ni/SAPO-11-L4 catalyst possess higher amount of Ni sites for hexane hydrogenation and alkene intermediates timely hydrogenation than that of the catalysts with larger Ni particles.

The high dispersion of Ni over the Ni/SAPO-11-L4 catalyst results in a higher number of Ni sites for hexane hydrogenation and timely hydrogenation of alkene intermediates compared to catalysts containing larger Ni particles.
语法检查：The factors mentioned above contribute to a higher mass activity and i-C6 selectivity of the small Ni particles over the catalyst than that of the larger ones.
The factors mentioned above contribute to a higher mass activity and i-C6 selectivity of the small Ni particles in the catalyst compared to the larger ones.
翻译

Translation: 

I am sorry, as an AI language model, I am unable to provide a translation without being given the original text to translate. Please provide the text you need translating and I will do my best to translate it for you.
翻译中文：The factors mentioned above contribute to a higher mass activity and i-C6 selectivity of the small Ni particles over the catalyst than that of the larger ones.
上述因素共同促进了小颗粒Ni催化剂的质量活性和i-C6选择性高于大颗粒Ni催化剂的现象。
语法检查：The better synergy between the metal and acid sites over the Ni/SAM-L4 with smaller Ni particles, which is confirmed by the smaller nas value than that over the other catalysts with larger ones.
The better synergy between the metal and acid sites on the Ni/SAM-L4 catalyst with smaller Ni particles is confirmed by the smaller nas value compared to other catalysts with larger Ni particles.
英文降重：The low-coordinated surface atoms have rich, dangling bonds, so they can easily interact with  n-hexane molecules., resulting in the significantly enhanced catalytic activities
The surface atoms with low coordination have abundant dangling bonds, which facilitate the interaction with n-hexane molecules, resulting in a significant increase in catalytic activity.
A是B的两倍
A is twice as much as B.
英文翻译：结果显示，当Ni NPs的尺寸从11.7nm减小到5.3nm时，角/阶梯Ni位点的比例是之前的1.5倍。
The results show that when the size of Ni NPs is reduced from 11.7 nm to 5.3 nm, the ratio of corner/step Ni sites is 1.5 times higher than before.
语法检测：This would cause the upshifting the d-band center, leading to the enhanced ability in absorption/activation H2
This would cause an upshift in the d-band center, leading to an enhanced ability to absorb and activate H2.
英文降重：the high dispersion of nickel over the catalyst provides relatively excessive metal sites (CNi/CA > 0.19), leaving the rate limiting reaction to occur on the acid sites.
The high nickel dispersion on the catalyst provides an excess of metal sites (CNi/CA > 0.19), resulting in the rate-limiting reaction occurring on the acid sites.

两句加个过度词：Increasing the metal dispersion can effectively enhance the (de)hydrogenation functions.
The high nickel dispersion over the catalyst provides an excess of metal sites (CNi/CA > 0.19), resulting in the rate-limiting reaction occurring on the acid sites.

Moreover, increasing the metal dispersion can effectively enhance the (de)hydrogenation functions. As a result, the high nickel dispersion over the catalyst provides an excess of metal sites (CNi/CA > 0.19), thereby resulting in the reaction-limited process occurring on the acid sites.
语法检查：The change in the surface structure of the metal particles may significantly affect the adsorption/activation abilities of the catalyst
The change in surface structure of metal particles may significantly affect the adsorption/activation abilities of the catalyst.
语法检查：Ionic liquid [Bmim][BF4] to Ni with a molar ratio of x (x = 1, 3 or 6).
Ionic liquid [Bmim][BF4] was added to Ni at a molar ratio of x (x = 1, 3 or 6).

语法检查：the Ni sites over the catalyst have enough hydrogenation ability to timely hydrogenation of the intermediate and thus undergo fewer acid-catalyzed steps, resulting in smaller DMB/MP and C/I ratios.

The Ni sites on the catalyst have sufficient hydrogenation ability to promptly hydrogenate the intermediates, which ultimately undergo fewer acid-catalyzed steps, leading to smaller DMB/MP and C/I ratios.
语法有错误么：the Ni sites over the catalyst have enough hydrogenation ability to timely hydrogenation of the intermediate

Yes, there is an error in the sentence. It should be "the Ni sites on the catalyst have enough hydrogenation ability to promptly hydrogenate the intermediates", since "hydrogenation" is a verb and needs an auxiliary verb "to" to form an infinitive, while "timely" is an adverb that can modify the verb "hydrogenate".
语法检查：resulting in low DMB/MP and C/I ratios
The grammar in this sentence is correct.
语法检查：The TOFn-C6 value against Ni particle sizes are shown in Fig. 10a.
The TOFn-C6 values against Ni particle sizes are shown in Fig. 10a.

语法检查：This is because small Ni particles possessed a higher amount of Ni sites and a higher proportion of low-coordinated corner/step Ni sites, which favored the intermediate’s timely hydrogen on the metal sites instead of excessive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking on acid sites.

The sentence is grammatically correct. However, here is an alternative phrasing for clarity: "This is because small Ni particles possess a higher concentration of Ni sites and a higher proportion of low-coordinated corner/step Ni sites, which promote prompt hydrogenation of intermediates on the metal sites. This reduces excess skeletal rearrangement or cracking on acid sites, resulting in a lower DMB/MP and C/I ratios."
语法检查·：To further examine reason of the different product distribution over the catalysts with various Ni NPs
To further investigate the reason for the different product distribution over the catalysts with various Ni NPs.
中文翻译To further examine reason of the different product distribution over the catalysts with various Ni NPs
进一步检查不同Ni NPs催化剂上产物分布不同的原因。
语法检查：To further investigate the reason of the different product distribution over the catalysts with various Ni NPs
The grammar in this sentence is correct.

语法检查：The results suggest that decreasing Ni particle size promote the synergy between metal and acid sites, reducing the acid catalyzed steps between two metal sites, thus resulting a lower DMB to MP and the C/I ratios in the product distribution.

The results suggest that reducing the particle size of Ni promotes the synergy between metal and acid sites, which reduces the acid-catalyzed steps between two metal sites. This results in a lower DMB to MP ratio and C/I ratio in the product distribution.

下面这句话有语法错误么：The results suggest that decreasing Ni particle size promote the synergy between metal and acid sites, reducing the acid catalyzed steps between two metal sites, thus resulting a lower DMB to MP and the C/I ratios in the product distribution.

Yes, there is an error in this sentence. It should be "The results suggest that reducing the particle size of Ni promotes the synergy between metal and acid sites, which reduces the acid-catalyzed steps between two metal sites. This results in a lower DMB to MP ratio and C/I ratio in the product distribution." 

The error (besides the one I corrected) was using "thus resulting" instead of "This," and forgetting the article "the" before C/I ratios.
thus resulting 对么
"thus resulting" is grammatically correct, but based on the context of the sentence, it doesn't flow naturally. Using "This" instead of "thus resulting" makes the sentence flow more smoothly.
This results in a 对么
Yes, "This results in a" is grammatically correct and it connects the previous and the following sentence more naturally.
语法检查：In-depth analysis suggest that smaller Ni particle show a great synergetic effect between metal and acid sites.
An in-depth analysis suggests that smaller Ni particles exhibit a greater synergistic effect between metal and acid sites.
语法检查：In-depth analysis suggest that smaller Ni particle show a great synergetic effect between metal and acid sites.
An in-depth analysis suggests that smaller Ni particles exhibit a greater synergistic effect between metal and acid sites.
